entities.name: Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia
entities.description: The exhibit card identifies the object as Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia, serial CM-107, with crew Armstrong, Aldrin, Collins and catalog A19700102000.

request.query: Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia CM-107 catalog A19700102000

response.query: Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia CM-107 catalog A19700102000

results.title: Smithsonian National Air and Space Museum - Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia
results.snippet: The collection record identifies the Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia as object A19700102000. The command module is serial number CM-107 and was the crew compartment for Armstrong, Aldrin, and Collins.

results.title: NASA Apollo 11 Mission - Command and Service Module
results.snippet: Apollo 11 used command module Columbia as the crew cabin and the only spacecraft module that returned astronauts to Earth after the lunar landing mission.

results.title: Smithsonian National Air and Space Museum - Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia
results.snippet: The collection record identifies the Apollo 11 Command Module Columbia as object A19700102000. The command module is serial number CM-107 and was the crew compartment for Armstrong, Aldrin, and Collins.

results.title: National Air and Space Museum - Destination Moon
results.snippet: Destination Moon presents the Apollo 11 mission with Command Module Columbia as a central artifact in the museum's lunar exploration gallery context.
